calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2018 Continued To Nov-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to NOV-06-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Continued To Sep-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by plaintiff. Courtney M. Osborn, Esq. appearing for the defendant. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to SEP-18-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2018 Continued To Jun-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Christopher Epsha, Esq. of the Clingo Law Group, APC, T:310.220.5921, for plaintiff/moving party, by Court Call;
Courtney Osborne, Esq. of Littler Mendelson PC, T:415.216.1230, for defendant.

RULING: Hearing held. There was no appearance by plaintiff. There being no opposition, the Clingo Law Group [and Jennifer A. Clingo's] MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF YUSUF KOCABIYIK is GRANTED. Counsel for defendant's oral request to dismiss the case is denied.

ORDER SIGNED.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.
